artifacts.name: LongMemEval-S cleaned
artifacts.notes: Primary retrieval-only benchmark for R@5/R@10 parity with public comparison tables.

artifacts.name: LongMemEval oracle cleaned
artifacts.notes: Oracle split used for sanity checks and methodology comparison.

artifacts.name: MemoryAgentBench Hugging Face snapshot
artifacts.notes: MemoryData loader falls back to this HF dataset when local save_to_disk copy is absent.

artifacts.name: LoCoMo raw locomo10
artifacts.notes: Raw LoCoMo data; MemoryData full preset still expects a preprocessed 4-category dist file.

artifacts.name: LoCoMo 4-category MemoryData dist
artifacts.notes: Derived from official locomo10.json by retaining categories 1-4, the four LoCoMo QA types used by common memory benchmark reports.

artifacts.name: LongBench-v2 150-row proportional subset
artifacts.notes: Derived from THUDM/LongBench-v2 train split and saved to the MemoryData LongBench_rep150_proportional path.

artifacts.name: LongBench-v2 503-question full
artifacts.notes: Official THUDM/LongBench-v2 train split saved as a MemoryData-compatible 503-question full dataset.

artifacts.name: MemBench FirstAgent slices
artifacts.notes: Direct raw download of the five MemoryData FirstAgent JSON slices.

longmemeval.name: LongMemEval-S cleaned
longmemeval.notes: Retrieval-only benchmark artifact; not a MemoryData full family.

memorydata_families.name: MemoryAgentBench Hugging Face snapshot
memorydata_families.notes: Hugging Face save_to_disk directory expected by MemoryData.

memorydata_families.name: LoCoMo 4-category preprocessed dist
memorydata_families.notes: Derived from official LoCoMo locomo10.json by retaining QA categories 1-4 and writing the MemoryData full-preset path.

memorydata_families.name: LoCoMo category5 adversarial
memorydata_families.notes: Supplemental category 5 adversarial track read from official locomo10.json; kept separate from the category 1-4 QA score.

memorydata_families.name: LongBench proportional subset
memorydata_families.notes: Derived from THUDM/LongBench-v2 train split as a deterministic 150-row proportional save_to_disk subset.

memorydata_families.name: LongBench-v2 503-question full
memorydata_families.notes: Official THUDM/LongBench-v2 train split saved to disk for the 503-question full benchmark configuration.

entries.industry_usage: Used by public memory systems for LongMemEval-S retrieval and QA comparisons.
entries.limitations: 当前只证明 retrieval loop；未跑 full answer generation 和 judge，不可写成 LongMemEval full 成绩。
entries.local_result_status: No completed benchmark result in current report.
entries.scope: Retrieval smoke / AMH ranking smoke only in the current report.
entries.tier_label: C：smoke / adapter 验证，不可当 benchmark 成绩

entries.industry_usage: Oracle-style LongMemEval splits are often used for retrieval sanity checks.
entries.limitations: 本地未就绪；不能参与下一阶段 full 结论。
entries.local_result_status: No completed benchmark result in current report.
entries.scope: Not materialized in the current local run.
entries.tier_label: C：smoke / adapter 验证，不可当 benchmark 成绩

entries.industry_usage: MemoryData unifies MemoryAgentBench as one of its four benchmark families.
entries.limitations: Core four-dimensional representative configs are complete locally; InfBench summarization LLM-as-judge remains a separate track.
entries.local_result_status: No MemoryAgentBench full result in current report.
entries.scope: Four core capability tracks: AR / TTL / LRU / CR.
entries.tier_label: A：论文/官方同源 full 可比

entries.industry_usage: LoCoMo is widely used for long-term conversational memory QA evaluation.
entries.limitations: Raw source only; benchmark scoring uses the derived MemoryData-compatible 4-category file.
entries.local_result_status: No completed benchmark result in current report.
entries.scope: Official raw source for downstream LoCoMo 4-category artifact.
entries.tier_label: B：官方同源但有派生/子集边界

entries.industry_usage: Common memory-tool reports use LoCoMo QA with 10 conversations and 1540 category 1-4 questions.
entries.limitations: 官方原始数据派生：保留 category 1-4，排除 adversarial/category 5；不是重新下载的第三方私有副本。
entries.local_result_status: Dataset ready; only MemoryData smoke is completed in current report.
entries.scope: Question-answering categories 1-4 from official LoCoMo raw data.
entries.tier_label: B：官方同源但有派生/子集边界

entries.industry_usage: MemoryData includes LongBench as a benchmark family for long-context reasoning.
entries.limitations: 150-row proportional subset；不是 LongBench-v2 503-question full set。
entries.local_result_status: Dataset ready as 150-row subset; only MemoryData smoke is completed in current report.
entries.tier_label: B：官方同源但有派生/子集边界

entries.industry_usage: MemoryData includes LongBench as a benchmark family for long-context reasoning.
entries.limitations: Full dataset source is official; score comparability still depends on the same model and judging/evaluation harness.
entries.local_result_status: LongBench-v2 503 full dataset may be ready, but no completed 503 full result is in the current report.
entries.scope: Official 503-question LongBench-v2 full set through a MemoryData-compatible save_to_disk path.
entries.tier_label: A：论文/官方同源 full 可比

entries.industry_usage: MemoryData includes MemBench as a benchmark family; Letta issue trackers also reference MemBench as a standardized memory benchmark candidate.
entries.limitations: FirstAgent 五个 public slice 是 MemoryData-compatible full-family 口径；仍需和其他私有/扩展 MemBench 口径区分。
entries.tier_label: B：官方同源但有派生/子集边界

required_actions: LoCoMo：确认 MemoryData full preset 是否接受 4-category derived file；full 结果必须标注为 category 1-4 QA，不含 adversarial/category 5。
LongBench：补跑 THUDM/LongBench-v2 503-question full；rep150 只能作为 B 档子集结果。
MemBench：从 simple smoke 扩展到 FirstAgent 五个 slice full，并逐 slice 发布样本数和指标。
LongMemEval：retrieval smoke 不能冒充 full QA；若要横向对比工具榜单，需要补 answer generation / judge 或明确只比较 R@K。

result_entries.limitations: 未达到预期行数，不能作为 full 成绩。
result_entries.tier_label: C：smoke / adapter 验证，不可当 benchmark 成绩

result_entries.limitations: 未达到预期行数，不能作为 full 成绩。
result_entries.tier_label: C：smoke / adapter 验证，不可当 benchmark 成绩

result_entries.limitations: 未达到预期行数，不能作为 full 成绩。
result_entries.tier_label: C：smoke / adapter 验证，不可当 benchmark 成绩

result_entries.limitations: MemBench public FirstAgent simple slice full.
result_entries.tier_label: B：官方同源但有派生/子集边界

tier_definitions.label: A：论文/官方同源 full 可比
B：官方同源但有派生/子集边界
C：smoke / adapter 验证，不可当 benchmark 成绩

arxiv_2606_24775.reason: Paper reference for agent-native memory evaluation taxonomy.

memtron_agentmemory_bench.reason: Current public source lock uses OpenDataBox/MemoryData; MEMTRON/AgentMemory-Bench is not treated as an anonymously readable canonical repo.

openviking.reason: Design/reference source, not an AMH result source.

primary_dataset.name: LongMemEval-S cleaned
primary_dataset.notes: Primary retrieval-only benchmark for R@5/R@10 parity with public comparison tables.

stages.gate: LongMemEval-S cleaned 数据源锁定；QA/Judge 不复用 MemoryAgentBench 300-QA 派生口径冒充 500 full。
stages.name: source lock

stages.gate: 本地存在 LongMemEval-S cleaned 数据。
stages.name: dataset materialize

stages.gate: 必须保存逐题 output 的 generation *_results.json。
stages.name: answer generation

stages.gate: 必须保存 sidecar judge JSON，且 judged_rows 覆盖 supported_rows。
stages.name: LLM-as-judge

stages.gate: generation 与 judge 分数单独发布，不替代 retrieval R@K。
stages.name: report publish

primary_dataset.name: LongMemEval-S cleaned
primary_dataset.notes: Primary retrieval-only benchmark for R@5/R@10 parity with public comparison tables.

stages.gate: LongMemEval cleaned 数据源锁定到 Hugging Face xiaowu0162/longmemeval-cleaned。
stages.name: source lock

stages.gate: 本地存在 longmemeval_s_cleaned.json，且文件非空。
stages.name: dataset materialize

stages.gate: 先跑小样本 R@5/R@10，不依赖外部 LLM judge。
stages.name: retrieval-only smoke

stages.gate: 把 session evidence 写成 MemoryItem，再用 AMH retriever 计算 R@K。
stages.name: AMH ranking run

stages.gate: 只有跑出本地可复现指标后，才能写 LongMemEval-S R@K 数字。
stages.name: report publish

metric_matrix.amh_local_metric: Recall@10、MRR、词频/BM25、向量召回、RRF 融合
metric_matrix.gate: 候选必须可追溯到 MemoryItem 和 source evidence

metric_matrix.amh_local_metric: WriteService、MemoryItem 写入审计、runtime ledger、feedback ledger
metric_matrix.gate: 新事实必须落到本地事实层，不能只停在 prompt

metric_matrix.amh_local_metric: locator / overview / detail 分层注入、ContextPack 可逆、token budget
metric_matrix.external_metric: MemoryAgentBench LRU、LoCoMo long conversation、多跳/时序问题
metric_matrix.gate: 长上下文只允许分层装载，detail 需要按需取证

metric_matrix.amh_local_metric: supersession、stale filter、用户/Agent 反馈、成熟度和废止过滤
metric_matrix.external_metric: MemoryAgentBench CR、知识更新、过期/冲突状态处理
metric_matrix.gate: 旧事实不得覆盖新证据；冲突必须保留来源边界

metric_matrix.amh_local_metric: 弱意图阻断、可注入识别、防火墙 include/exclude、ContextPack 可逆
metric_matrix.gate: 能完成任务，也要能拒绝不该注入的上下文

metric_matrix.amh_local_metric: indexed items、运行耗时、top_k、pack reversible、报告生成耗时
metric_matrix.external_metric: token / latency / storage / indexed items / scale benchmark
metric_matrix.gate: 报告必须同时给准确率和成本边界

publication_rules: AMH 本地指标可以直接发布，但必须带用例数、indexed items、top_k 和运行耗时。
外部 source-lock 只证明来源和入口可复核，不等于跑完外部榜单。
smoke 只证明 adapter / dataset / endpoint 最小链路可跑，不能外推到 full matrix。
full matrix 必须按来源维度写清 benchmark family、样本范围、指标和失败类型。
OpenViking、agentmemory COMPARISON、State-Bench、MemoryAgentBench 都是评估口径来源；没有真实运行就不写外部成绩。

reference_sources.name: agentmemory COMPARISON
reference_sources.role: 横向对照口径：LongMemEval、质量、规模、成本，不把第三方表格数字冒充 AMH 结果。
reference_sources.signals: LongMemEval / quality benchmark / scale benchmark / cost

reference_sources.name: State-Bench
reference_sources.role: 有状态任务闭环口径：任务完成率、可靠性、效率、用户体验。
reference_sources.signals: task completion / pass^5 / efficiency / user experience

reference_sources.name: MemoryAgentBench
reference_sources.role: 能力分型口径：准确召回、测试时学习、长程理解、冲突解决。
reference_sources.signals: 准确召回 / 测试时学习 / 长程理解 / 冲突解决

reference_sources.name: OpenViking
reference_sources.role: 公开评测体系参考：LoCoMo、tau2-bench、HotpotQA / KB QA、延迟和 token 成本。
reference_sources.signals: LoCoMo / tau2-bench / HotpotQA / KB QA / latency / token cost

stages.gate: 四份外部资料有固定 URL；MemoryData 本地 repo 有 commit SHA。
stages.name: source lock

stages.gate: MemoryAgentBench / LoCoMo / LongBench / MemBench 数据集本地可读。
stages.name: dataset materialize

stages.gate: AMH write / retrieve / update / context pack 映射到外部 runner。
stages.name: adapter mapping

stages.gate: 最小样本在依赖、数据集和 OpenAI-compatible endpoint 全部 ready 后执行。
stages.name: smoke run

stages.gate: smoke pass 后才跑 AR / TTL / LRU / CR、LoCoMo、State-Bench 类任务。
stages.name: full matrix

stages.gate: 本地指标已发布；外部指标必须区分 source-lock / smoke / full matrix。
stages.name: report publish
